selections.name: Signed By A Kiss
selections.reason: Has race experience and placed on soft going previously. Top weight but class prevails in this field.

selections.name: Helizangel
selections.reason: Ran a solid 4th behind Vivid Storm in the same race as the top pick. Can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Delahra
selections.reason: Ran 5th on a heavy track on debut. Will strip fitter for that experience.

selections.name: Tagabella
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Showed some ability in debut and respecting the stable.

danger_horse.name: Anglais
danger_horse.reason: First starter with solid trial form. Watch betting markets closely.

selections.name: Tisseyre
selections.reason: Won on heavy going last start. Drawn wide which is a massive advantage on a Heavy 9 at Sandown Lakeside.

selections.name: Star Of Rossa
selections.reason: Won on a heavy track first up. Avoids the heavy weight penalty and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Off Their Perch
selections.reason: Won on heavy last start and drawn perfectly for a swooper, but carries a 6-point penalty for 60kg+ on heavy going.

selections.name: Meleys
selections.reason: Has won two in a row including on soft. Inside draw is a negative on this track profile and carries a heavy weight penalty.

danger_horse.name: Beautifully
danger_horse.reason: Placed on heavy going and drawn well for the track bias, though penalized for weight.

selections.name: Eleanor Dumont
selections.reason: Loves the wet with two wins on heavy tracks. Dominant last time out and overcomes the weight penalty with raw class.

selections.name: Geffina
selections.reason: Strong recent form and handles the wet conditions well. Drawn out wide which suits the swooper profile.

selections.name: Perfect Ten
selections.reason: Won last start on soft going. Flying at the moment and should take beating despite the weight penalty.

selections.name: Lisa Lass
selections.reason: Gets a +3 rating bonus for carrying a light weight (120lbs) on a heavy track. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Street Lark
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and avoids the heavy weight penalties. Can figure in the placings.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-3, Trifecta 1 / 3,4,12 / ALL

selections.name: Empress Of The Sun
selections.reason: Won on a heavy track last start over this exact distance. Avoids weight penalties and is a big chance on latest effort.

selections.name: Shultzy
selections.reason: Won on heavy going last start over this distance. Form is hard to fault and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Customer Service
selections.reason: Finished 2nd on a heavy track last start over this distance. Drawn wide (12) which is excellent for swooping.

selections.name: Nearco Frod
selections.reason: Placed on both soft and heavy going recently. Drawn well out wide to find the better ground.

danger_horse.name: Lightening Mann
danger_horse.reason: Won on soft going last start. Worth following up despite the inside draw.

selections.name: Forever With Ned
selections.reason: Won on heavy going last start. Drawn perfectly in barrier 14 to swoop down the outside on the chopped out track.

selections.name: Proven Soul
selections.reason: Very consistent form and handles the wet. The inside draw is the only major concern on this track profile.

selections.name: Tempranillo
selections.reason: Good form and drawn well out wide. Takes a 6-point penalty for weight but still rates highly.

selections.name: Drone Attack
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going and avoids the heavy weight penalties. Solid each-way chance.

danger_horse.name: That's All Good
danger_horse.reason: Gets a +3 rating bonus for light weight (120lbs) and drawn perfectly out wide for the track bias.

selections.name: Tori's Dee
selections.reason: Flying with four straight wins including on heavy going. Drawn perfectly out wide and overcomes the weight penalty.

selections.name: Thinxzo
selections.reason: Won on heavy going last start. Drawn perfectly in 14 to swoop. Takes a weight penalty but remains a top threat.

selections.name: Cinturato
selections.reason: Won on heavy going two starts back. Drawn well and avoids the heavy weight penalties.

selections.name: Jugiong
selections.reason: Finished 2nd on soft going last start. Inside draw is a disadvantage but has the ability to figure.

danger_horse.name: Humza Bey
danger_horse.reason: Good recent form and drawn perfectly out wide to take advantage of the track bias.

selections.name: Red On Red
selections.reason: Won on heavy going two starts back. Drawn well in the middle to find the better ground.

selections.name: Corro
selections.reason: Won on heavy going recently. Inside draw is a slight concern but form is hard to fault.

selections.name: Cat Noir
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going and drawn perfectly in barrier 16 to swoop down the outside.

selections.name: Leonchroi
selections.reason: Consistent form and drawn well out wide. Avoids the heavy weight penalties.

danger_horse.name: Dark Simba
danger_horse.reason: Won on soft going last start. Takes a heavy weight penalty but drawn well.
